hero.subtitle: We use Artificial Intelligence and Collaborative Filtering based on your
hero.subtitle2: to recommend personalized deals and track historical lows.

features.svdDesc: 7-latent-factor algorithm optimized for Steam. We don't recommend what's popular, we recommend what you'll love.
features.playtimeDesc: We analyze your real playtime hours, the most honest metric to understand your true gaming preferences.
features.dealsDesc: Integration with IsThereAnyDeal to ensure you buy at the exact moment the price hits rock bottom.

deals.noTopSteam: No Top Steam recommendations available yet for your profile.

stats.title: Your Statistics
stats.subtitle: Analysis based on your real Steam playtime.
stats.noGenreData: Not enough gameplay data to analyze your genres.
stats.comingSoonDesc: We're working on integrating more data about your gaming habits, like never-played games, completed achievements, and more.

footer.description: Smart game recommendations based on your real playtime.
footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with Valve Corporation. Steam and the Steam logo are trademarks of Valve Corporation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At GameWasters, we respect your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
collectItems: Your public Steam ID (encrypted and hashed on our servers)
List of games in your Steam library (public information)
Genre preferences derived from your activity
useItems: Show you relevant deals based on your tastes
noSellItems: We do not sell your information to third parties
We do not store your Steam password
We do not access private account information
We do not send unsolicited emails
privacy.securityDesc: Your Steam ID is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage. We only keep an irreversible hash as identifier.
privacy.deleteDesc: You can request deletion of your data by contacting us. We will delete all your information within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using GameWasters, you agree to these terms of service.
terms.serviceDesc: GameWasters is a free tool that analyzes your Steam library to offer game recommendations and deal alerts.
accountItems: You must have a valid Steam account to use the service
Your Steam profile must be public for us to access your library
You are responsible for keeping your session token secure
limitationsItems: Recommendations are automatically generated and may not be perfect
Displayed prices may not be updated in real time
We do not guarantee continuous service availability
terms.ipDesc: Steam, Steam logos, and game data are property of Valve Corporation. GameWasters is not affiliated with Valve.
terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Changes will be posted on this page.
